description: Pickup-focused, in-training-distribution diagnostic for the latest locally available Friday 2026-07-10 session. Each episode contributes a valid reach frame, the first successful pickup gripper-close transition, and the first stable hanging-chain frame. Episode 1631 is excluded because its repeated pickup retries do not provide a fully valid 50-step pickup target. These episodes are not held out and their stored subtask_index is 0 (__unlabeled__).

selection.mapping: raw episode N maps to final episode 1625 + N
selection.frame_rule: valid reach representative; successful gripper close; ten frames after close; first stable hanging-chain representative
selection.validity_rule: selected frame and its following 49 target actions all have valid_state=1

excluded_episode_ids.1631: repeated pickup retries; no fully valid 50-step pickup target
